stemHtml: Considering the Threat and Error Management (TEM) model, which of the following situations is considered an error?

options.a: Take-off with less than the legally required amount of fuel on board due to an erroneous calculation by the dispatch crew.
options.b: Inadequate control inputs resulting in a hard landing and the collapse of the landing gear.
options.c: A lateral offset from the cleared track as a result of a drifting IRS.
options.d: A descent below the glide path in wind shear.
